title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Memory monitoring service Pepe: triggered at 85% context utilization, summarizes conversation-turn memories via LLM into one sentence each, embeds using character 3-gram hash to 256D, filters by cosine similarity to current goal (threshold 0.3), writes selected IDs to session. Runs as optional background thread in AgentTaskRunner, with 30s cooldown and min 3 memories.
